nodes.name: Zapier Webhook Receiver
nodes.notes: Receives PLAUD transcript from Zapier. Payload: { title, transcript, duration, timestamp }

nodes.name: Store Raw Transcript

parameters.query: INSERT INTO raw_transcripts (transcript_id, title, raw_content, duration_seconds, source, ingested_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, 'plaud', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (transcript_id) DO NOTHING RETURNING id;

nodes.notes: Insert into raw_transcripts. transcript_id is unique to prevent duplicates.

nodes.name: Upload to Drive INBOX
nodes.notes: Upload raw transcript to Google Drive 00_INBOX folder. Replace folderId with actual ID.

nodes.name: Update Drive Path

parameters.query: UPDATE raw_transcripts SET drive_path = $1 WHERE transcript_id = $2;

nodes.notes: Store the Drive file path back in the database.

nodes.name: Send Gmail Confirmation

parameters.subject: Transcript received — {{$json.title}} — {{$now.format('yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')}}

nodes.notes: Step 5: Gmail confirmation to Fabian. Phase 0 stops here — no extraction.

parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (event_type, entity_type, source, metadata) VALUES ('TranscriptReceived', 'transcript', 'plaud', jsonb_build_object('title', $1, 'transcript_id', $2));

INSERT INTO health_checks (component, last_run, status, message) VALUES ('plaud_pipeline', NOW(), 'ok', $1) ON CONFLICT (component) DO UPDATE SET last_run = EXCLUDED.last_run, status = EXCLUDED.status, message = EXCLUDED.message;

meta.description: Phase 0 PLAUD pipeline (5 steps): PLAUD > Zapier > n8n webhook > Drive 00_INBOX > Gmail confirm. No extraction. No register writes. No AI. Prove the pipe before adding intelligence.
